title: Auto Attack Port
description: holding down the attack button will automatically swing your weapon.
body:
This mod is a 1.20.1 port of Auto Attack. The original author has open-sourced it and released it under the Unlicense license.

With this mod, holding down the attack button will automatically swing your weapon. Each swing occurs immediately after the attack cooldown finishes, ensuring maximum damage is dealt every time.

The mod attempts to avoid automatically attacking pets.
